utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items with entries present. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: clearly specifies physical and mental health components with named plans and explicit monthly costs (€100 and €65) and a total (€165/month). Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes plan name and monthly cost (€60/month) and coverage details. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: includes package name and monthly cost (€80/month) and coverage features. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: lists services and states they are included at no additional cost, which satisfies “with costs” by indicating €0 incremental. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual totals and a comparison; includes breakdown. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four selections: two health components (Physical Health: LifeFirst Standard Plan and Mental Health: LifeFirst Standard Plan), one property component (LifeFirst Standard Coverage), and one travel component (Adventure Travel Package). From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage -> physical_health and mental_health, each with rating 9. LifeFirst Standard Coverage appears under property_protection -> home_content with rating 9. The 'Adventure Travel Package' corresponds to travel_enhancement_services -> Adventure Travel Coverage with rating 10.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Physical Health: LifeFirst Standard Plan €100/month (4-star quality, 8.0/10 rating, 24/7 support, 5% deductibles, telemedicine, gym reimbursement up to €300/month, full specialist access) + Mental Health: LifeFirst Standard Plan €65/month (4-star quality, 8.2/10 rating, specialized treatment programs, family therapy, crisis intervention). Total health coverage: €165/month",
    
    "property_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Coverage €60/month (4-star quality, replacement value coverage, TV/entertainment insurance up to €1,000, covers up to €25,000 in personal belongings)",
    
    "travel_coverage": "Adventure Travel Package €80/month (comprehensive extreme sports coverage including rock climbing and scuba diving, specialized rescue services, medical evacuation worldwide, no activity restrictions or exclusions)",
    
    "additional_services": "Telemedicine services, gym reimbursement up to €300/month, specialized rescue services, medical evacuation, crisis intervention services, priority specialist appointments - all included in base coverage plans at no additional cost",
    
    "total_budget": "Monthly cost: €305/month (€100 physical health + €65 mental health + €60 property + €80 travel/adventure). Annual cost: €3,660. Savings: €110/month (€1,320 annually) compared to current €415/month baseline. Policy start date: February 1st, 2024. All arrangements are finalized and binding."
